mapper.select:
SELECT A.PARTNER_ID /*제휴사ID*/ , A.PARTNER_NM /*제휴사명*/ , A.MANAGER_NM /*담당자명*/ , A.CONTACT_NUM /*연락처*/ , A.EMAIL /*이메일*/ , A.PARTNER_LINK_ID /*연동ID*/ , A.USE_YN /*제휴여부*/ , A.REGST_ID /*등록자*/ , TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM,'YYYYMMDD') AS REGST_DTTM /*등록일자*/ FROM MSP_PARTNER_MST A WHERE 1 = 1
AND UPPER(A.PARTNER_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER( #{searchVal} ) || '%'
AND UPPER(A.MANAGER_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER( #{searchVal} ) || '%'
ORDER BY A.PARTNER_ID DESC

/* PtnrMgmtMapper.ptnrRateHist */ SELECT HST.RATE_CD , RAT.RATE_NM , HST.PARTNER_ID AS PTNR_ID , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0243' AND USG_YN = 'Y' AND CD_VAL = HST.PARTNER_ID) AS PTNR_NM , RAT.RATE_TYPE , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0047' AND USG_YN = 'Y' AND CD_VAL = RAT.RATE_TYPE) AS RATE_TYPE_NM , RAT.DATA_TYPE , RAT.BASE_AMT , HST.POINT_TYPE , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0060' AND USG_YN = 'Y' AND CD_VAL = HST.POINT_TYPE) AS POINT_TYPE_NM , HST.POINT_VAL , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0242' AND USG_YN = 'Y' AND CD_VAL = HST.USE_YN) AS USE_YN , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(HST.STRT_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS STRT_DATE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(HST.END_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS END_DATE , FN_GET_USRNM(HST.RVISN_ID) AS USR_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST RAT , MSP_PARTNER_RATE_HIST HST WHERE RAT.PAY_CL_CD = 'PO' AND RAT.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND HST.RATE_CD = RAT.RATE_CD AND HST.RATE_CD = #{rateCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HST.POINT_TYPE = #{pointType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY HST.END_DATE DESC
mapper.insert: /* PtnrMgmtMapper.ptnrRateHistInsert */ INSERT INTO MSP_PARTNER_RATE_HIST ( SEQ_NUM , PARTNER_ID , RATE_CD , POINT_TYPE , POINT_VAL , USE_YN , STRT_DATE , END_DATE , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT SQ_MSP_PARTNER_RATE_HIST_01.nextVal , PARTNER_ID , RATE_CD , POINT_TYPE , POINT_VAL , USE_YN , STRT_DATE , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1/24/60/60, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM FROM MSP_PARTNER_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = #{rateCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND POINT_TYPE = #{pointType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: /* PtnrMgmtMapper.ptnrRateInfo */ SELECT RAT.RATE_CD , RAT.APPL_END_DT , RAT.APPL_STRT_DT , RAT.RATE_NM , RAT.RATE_TYPE , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0047' AND USG_YN = 'Y' AND CD_VAL = RAT.RATE_TYPE) AS RATE_TYPE_NM , RAT.DATA_TYPE , RAT.BASE_AMT FROM MSP_RATE_MST RAT WHERE RAT.PAY_CL_CD = 'PO' AND RAT.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND RAT.APPL_END_DT = '99991231' AND RAT.RATE_CD = #{rateCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY RAT.RATE_NM DESC
